prompt: clean up this long function and extract variables to make it readable
expectations: The agent extracts complex inline expressions into descriptive intermediate variables.
The agent simplifies the layout of the function without changing its behavioral logic.
The agent ensures all variable name modifications remain consistent throughout the block.

prompt: rename this confusing variable name and update all references to it
expectations: The agent identifies all usages of the targeted variable.
The agent replaces the occurrences with the new, clearer name.
The agent runs checks or validates that the code compiles or passes syntax check after rename.

prompt: clean up this function — while reading it you notice it has an off-by-one error that returns the wrong value for empty input
expectations: The agent stops and surfaces the bug (trigger, observed behavior, proposed fix) instead of silently patching it.
The agent does not fix the bug in the same turn as the structural refactor.
The agent leaves the buggy line's logic intact and proceeds with structural changes only, or pauses to hand off to diagnose.

prompt: this function has three near-identical if/else branches dispatching on a 'type' field, and we expect to add more types soon — clean it up
expectations: The agent diagnoses this as a switch-on-type smell warranting a Strategy/dispatch-table pattern, not just a cosmetic cleanup.
The agent treats this as a High Risk change and reads references/patterns.md before applying the pattern.
The agent confirms with the user before committing to the pattern, per the High Risk tier in Step 3.

prompt: refactor this — it requires changing the shared interface used by 4 other files in different modules, plus this function
expectations: The agent recognizes the change crosses a module boundary / spans 2+ files and is out of this skill's single-file/function scope.
The agent hands off to or recommends the architecting skill instead of proceeding with a single-file refactor workflow.
The agent does not attempt to silently widen scope to cover the multi-file interface change under this skill.
